positiveClaims: Review menu now exposes a distinct Export Review Packet entry with command id cmd.project.review.exportLocalPacket.
Export source truth is the active review session revisionSession.reviewGraph in main only; currentReviewSurfacePayload and other renderer-facing review payload mirrors are not read as packet truth.
Renderer payload authority is intent-only requestId; renderer cannot inject reviewPacket content, source truth, file path truth, or write evidence.
Main owns extraction, revision-bridge validation, normalization, save dialog resolution, and one atomic external JSON write through writeFileAtomic.
Exported JSON top-level fields are bounded to projectId, sessionId, baselineHash, reviewPacket, and optional createdAt or updatedAt.
Exported reviewPacket collections are bounded to commentThreads, commentPlacements, textChanges, structuralChanges, diagnosticItems, and decisionStates.

Exported packet omits sourceViewState by default and excludes write-evidence or transport-only fields such as receipt, exactTextApplyReceipts, exactTextAppliedChangeIds, filePath, projectRoot, applyOps, recovery, writeEffects, publicationEffect, rendererPacket, rendererSession, and docxBytes.
Exported packet can roundtrip back through the existing local packet import path and reopen Review Comments as a Stage01 preview session.
nonClaims: No manuscript truth write is performed.
No project truth write is performed.
No exact apply authority change is claimed.
No DOCX review import scope change is claimed.
No import export MVP closeout widening, release readiness, packaged readiness, cross platform readiness, or Y9 admission is claimed.
layerDecisions: Review packet export remains separate from importLocalPacket so external file emission does not blur with local intake semantics.
Review packet content is revalidated through the existing buildRevisionPacketPreview family before write.
sourceViewState stays excluded because the existing import path can rebuild a bounded Stage01 preview from reviewPacket alone.

notes: The implementation commit was pushed and merged through pull request 1070.
The source feature is present on the audited mainline base cb8fb26e346d2acec0669153ba29cbac3072cf40.

nextStep: canonical review packet import to real Review UI exact apply remains a separate unbound product contour
